stage4-resync: bring prod to current dev main (043cdb89) — supervisor coordination after Lane 1 merged

Closes the Wave 2 cross-lane coupling: Lane 1's merge added 86 commits
to dev main that needed propagation via Lane 2's pipeline. Re-syncing
prod with the post-Lane-1 main HEAD so Lane 4 (VERIFY) can run against
current code.

stage9: stateless HMAC admin sessions for CF Workers compatibility

Replace in-memory Map session store with HMAC-signed tokens so admin
auth works across stateless CF Workers isolates. The cookie itself
encodes expiry + signature; any isolate can validate without shared state.
Callers pass env.ADMIN_KEY as signing key; local dev falls back to UUID.
